Did the Inuit invent Rap?

# Did the Inuit invent Rap?

### Aggressive verbal duels in Homer, the pastoral world and the Arctic. Some polar ethnomusicology, throat singing, beatboxing.

[](https://substack.com/@stoneageherbalist)

*In this linguistic duel, two* \[Inuit\] *men, at least one of whom possessed some form of bitterness towards the other, would take turns at singing ironical songs of their composition, in order to make f…*
